name: vibe-engineering
description: Agent-neutral virtual engineering team runtime with workflow gates, global memory, and traceable ChangeSets.

scripts.check: node --check bin/vibe-engineering.mjs && find src tests -name '*.mjs' -print -exec node --check {} \;
scripts.ci: npm run verify && npm run audit && npm run pack:dry
scripts.smoke: node ./bin/vibe-engineering.mjs init && node ./bin/vibe-engineering.mjs create-goal --title "Smoke goal" --description "Verify runtime wiring" && node ./bin/vibe-engineering.mjs scan && node ./bin/vibe-engineering.mjs role --role pm && node ./bin/vibe-engineering.mjs export
